title: Match filtering is by season only; no explicit date-range params
evidence: SoccerService.java:39 toolFindMatches reads 'season' but no from/to date arguments; requirement R4 ('date range and/or season') is satisfied via season.
suggestion: Optionally accept 'from'/'to' ISO dates and filter on Match.date for full date-range support.

title: Acceptance tests correctly drive the SUT only through the MCP protocol
evidence: McpTestClient.java:16 exercises initialize/tools-list/tools-call with no internal access; all *AcceptanceTest classes assert on domain outcomes (e.g. CompetitionAndStatsAcceptanceTest.java:22 calculates_the_2019_brasileirao_final_standings).
suggestion: None — confirms the ATDD prompt was followed (external-user, public-interface, domain-language tests).

title: Tool schema advertises serie_b/serie_c beyond the three required competitions
evidence: McpServer.java:121 find_matches competition prop lists 'serie_b, serie_c'; Competition.fromTournamentLabel maps the extended dataset.
suggestion: None — superset of R5; no action needed.

title: Low token efficiency for this run (long ATDD build-up)
suggestion: Cross-run comparison context only; not a code defect.
